evals.prompt: Replace my ZXing.Net.Mobile continuous-scan loop with Scandit MatrixScan Batch. Every visible barcode (EAN-13, Code 128, QR) should be tracked and accumulated into a dedupe-by-tracking-id list. Here is my Activity: ZxingActivity.cs.
evals.expected_output: The skill removes ZXing references (the using ZXing.Mobile directive, the MobileBarcodeScanner instance, the StartScanLoopAsync loop, the BarcodeFormat -> string conversion) and replaces them with MatrixScan Batch: DataCaptureContext.ForLicenseKey, manual camera setup via Camera.GetDefaultCamera + BarcodeBatch.RecommendedCameraSettings + SetFrameSourceAsync, BarcodeBatchSettings.Create with Ean13Upca + Code128 + Qr, BarcodeBatch.Create, DataCaptureView.Create added to a FrameLayout container, BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay.Create, IBarcodeBatchListener with OnSessionUpdated reading session.AddedTrackedBarcodes (dispatched to RunOnUiThread). The existing ScannedBarcode record and the dedupe-on-Value (or dedupe-on-tracking-id) logic is preserved. The skill provides the setup checklist (NuGet packages, manifest permission, runtime permission, MainApplication initialize for SDK 8.0+).

assertions.text: The using ZXing.Mobile directive is removed
The MobileBarcodeScanner instance and its instantiation (new MobileBarcodeScanner()) are removed
The StartScanLoopAsync recursive loop is removed (the new code does not re-trigger a scanner after each result)
No ZXing.BarcodeFormat usage remains
DataCaptureContext.ForLicenseKey( is used to create the context
BarcodeBatchSettings.Create() is used
BarcodeBatch.Create( is used as the factory
Symbology.Ean13Upca is enabled (mapped from ZXing.BarcodeFormat.EAN_13)
Symbology.Code128 is enabled (mapped from ZXing.BarcodeFormat.CODE_128)
Symbology.Qr is enabled (mapped from ZXing.BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE — not Symbology.QrCode)
Camera.GetDefaultCamera() is used
BarcodeBatch.RecommendedCameraSettings is used as a static property
dataCaptureContext.SetFrameSourceAsync(camera) is called
DataCaptureView.Create( is used and added to a FrameLayout container
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay.Create( is called with both the BarcodeBatch and the DataCaptureView
The activity implements IBarcodeBatchListener (or subscribes to barcodeBatch.SessionUpdated +=)
OnSessionUpdated iterates session.AddedTrackedBarcodes (the new-this-frame collection)
The handler dispatches UI updates via RunOnUiThread (because OnSessionUpdated runs on a background recognition thread)
The existing ScannedBarcode record (or equivalent data model) is preserved
Dedupe logic (using either tracking Identifier or the barcode Value) is preserved in the new flow
Setup checklist is shown and mentions adding the Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode and Scandit.DataCapture.Core NuGet packages
Setup checklist mentions adding android.permission.CAMERA to AndroidManifest.xml
